news.t: Eventide Celebrates the One-Year Anniversary of Eventide High Dividend ETF (NYSE Arca: ELCV)
Eventide Announces Launch of Eventide High Dividend ETF (NYSE Arca: ELCV)

holdings.infoBox: ELCV is an equity ETF with a total of 46 individual holdings. The top holdings are Prologis stock at 5.36%, Entergy at 4.63%, The Williams Companies at 3.75%, Amgen at 3.68%, and Micron Technology at 3.42%.

overview.description: The Eventide High Dividend ETF (ELCV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high dividend yield equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of dividend-paying US stocks, selected through fundamental research and values-based principles. The fund seeks income, income growth, and long-term capital appreciation. ELCV was launched on Sep 30, 2024 and is issued by Eventide.

data.title: Eventide Announces Launch of Eventide High Dividend ETF (NYSE Arca: ELCV)
data.text: BOSTON , Oct. 1, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- Eventide Asset Management, LLC, a Boston-based investment adviser, today announces the launch of the Eventide High Dividend ETF (NYSE Arca: ELCV). Eventide's High...
